summary: The ad targets individuals aspiring to work in motorsports by showcasing relevant university programs in engineering, management, and marketing. It highlights that these programs are available at institutions accepting the Duolingo English Test. The call to action invites viewers to explore courses across 6,000+ accepted institutions.
